flows.name: DefaultValues
flows.func:
const settings = {
    // app admin sections
    "adminLogin": "",
    "userLogin": "",
    // UI experience
    "showSourceFiles": true,
    "nameOfSources": true,
    "showFragmentsActionBar": true,
    "canDownloadDocuments": true,
    "modelSelected": "gpt-4o-mini",
    "modelsAvailables": ["gpt-35-turbo", "gpt-4o-mini"],
    "outputTokensPicker": "2000",
    "topKPicker": "3",
    "thresholdPicker": "0.89",
    "showModel": true,
    "extraInfo": true,
    "enhanceDocument": true,
    "onlyEnhanceDocument": true,
    "assistantLanguageDefault": 'English',
    "nameAndPurposeOfAssistant": 'You are a helpful assistant who helps users with their questions.',
    "initialSuggestedQuestions": ["what its aXet Talk"],
    "initialCustomQuestions": [
        "Can you give me a summary of this document?",
        "What are the key points of this text?",
        "Can you formulate discussion questions about the content?",
        "What do you think about the conclusions of the document?"
    ],
    "suggestNextQuestions": true,
    // Video
    "videoTranscriptor": false,
    "imageinterpreter": false,
    // "talkEnablerToken": '',
    "spUser": "",
    "spPass": "",
    "spSite": "https://everisgroup.sharepoint.com/sites/CoERAGs-Videotranscriptor/",
    "spFolder": "Documentos%20compartidos/Video%20transcriptor/reference/",
    // Audit Module
    "chargeAccount": "INT",
    "auditUrl": "https://talkaudit.activos-coe.deptapps.everis.cloud/"
}

// Datos por Defecto
msg.submission = settings;
global.set("settings", settings);
node.warn("Restored settings DB Default Values")

return msg;

components.label: Enhance Document Quality (as Default)
components.description: This option will apply enhancements to improve the clarity and readability of the document before uploading.

components.label: Force to convert to TXT before uploading (as Default)
components.description: This option will convert the document to plain text format before uploading. This can improve accuracy for some complex documents.

components.label: HTML
components.content:
General Settings Help Guide

Welcome to the Admin Area of your application! This guide will help you understand the different settings parameters available to customize your experience.


ADMIN AREA

Document Manager: This is where you set or update the password for accessing to Document manager section. Ensure your password is strong and secure to prevent unauthorized access.
Admin Password: This is where you set or update the password for accessing the admin area. Ensure your password is strong and secure to prevent unauthorized access.


ASSISTANT

Name and Purpose of Assistant: Define the name and purpose of your assistant. For example, "You are a helpful Axet assistant who helps users with their questions." This setting is crucial as it sets the tone and identity of your assistant in user interactions.

Initial Suggested Questions: Here, you can set up a list of suggested questions that the assistant will initially offer to users. Example Questions: "What is the Axet plugin?" "How can I transcribe a text?" Remove item: You can remove any question by clicking the "Remove item" button next to the respective question.


CHAT

Assistant Suggests Possible Next Questions: Enable this setting if you want the assistant to suggest possible next questions to keep the conversation flowing naturally.

Show Model in the Response Toggle this option to show which AI model the assistant used to generate a response, providing transparency in the chat.


RESPONSE BAR

Name of Source Document in the Chat Response: When enabled, this setting displays the name of the source document from which the assistant pulls information during a chat. This helps users identify the origin of the content.

Show Fragments of Relevant Documents (Display Bar):Enable this to display snippets or fragments from relevant documents in the response bar, making it easier for users to see where the information is coming from.

Download Documents from the Response:This setting allows users to download documents directly from the chat response if they need the full content for further reference.


DOCUMENTS

Enhance Document Quality (as Default): When enabled, the application will automatically enhance documents to improve clarity and readability before they are uploaded. This is especially useful for documents with poor quality.

Force to Convert to TXT before Uploading (as Default): This setting will force the conversion of all documents to plain text (TXT) format before uploading. This can improve processing accuracy, especially for complex documents or those with heavy formatting.

components.label: HTML
components.content:
Parameters Settings Help Guide

Welcome to the Admin Area of your application! This guide will help you understand the different settings parameters available to customize your experience.

MODEL CONFIGURATION

Model: This parameter defines the AI model used by your application. The model determines the capabilities and performance of the AI.

Output Tokens: Default Setting: 1000
Specifies the maximum number of tokens (words or word parts) the model can generate in a single response. This controls the length of the output. Action: Adjust this number to increase or decrease the length of the AI's responses.

MODELS AVAILABLE

Models: You can add or remove models from this list. Click "Remove item" next to a model to delete it. Ensure you select the appropriate model based on your application’s needs.

RETRIEVAL CONFIGURATION

TOP K: Controls the number of top predictions considered during nucleus sampling. A higher value means more options are considered, which affects the diversity of the output.

Minimum Confidence Score: Determines the minimum confidence score required for predictions to be included during nucleus sampling. A lower score includes more options, whereas a higher score restricts the choices.

flows.func:
msg.evaResponse = msg.payload
msg.submission.dataGrid = msg.evaResponse.content

msg.submission.paginator.pageNumber = msg.evaResponse.pageable.pageNumber + 1
msg.submission.paginator.itemsPerPage = msg.evaResponse.pageable.pageSize
msg.submission.paginator.totalResults = msg.evaResponse.totalElements
msg.submission.documentCount = msg.submission.paginator.totalResults
msg.submission.spinnerOff = true
return msg;

flows.name: post-call
flows.func: const userName = msg.__axetFlowsSecurityContext.userName msg.requester = { "email": userName } msg.evaResponse = msg.payload msg.submission.currentBotVersion = `Current EVA.Bot Version ${msg.evaResponse.currentVersion} ` msg.page = msg.submission.paginator.pageNumber || 1 msg.linesPerPage = msg.submission.paginator.itemsPerPage || 5 msg.submission.possibleErrors = (msg.payload.documentStatus == "error" || msg.payload.documentStatus == "partial") ? `Documents With Errors Please delete the last documents uploaded documents and train again.` : "" if (msg.evaResponse.trainingAvailable == 'trainable' && msg.submission.possibleErrors.length == 0) msg.submission.newTrainableVersion = `Important! You have new ${msg.evaResponse.trainingAvailable} BOT, next Version: ${msg.evaResponse.nextVersion}.` return msg;

components.label: HTML
components.content:
Automated Testing Process

How to fill the Template


Fields to Complete

COMPONENT CATEGORY: Specify whether the source is an Eva Flow or a Document. In most cases, this will be "document".
INTENT, DOCUMENT OR QUESTION: The name of the document uploaded without the extension. Ex. "GAIA-Introduction".
DESCRIPTION: The ID of the test. ex. "T001".
INTERACTION: The Question you want to test. Ex. "What is Axet Gaia?".
EXPECTED ANSWER: The answer you expect to receive. ex. "Axet Gaia is a sophisticated value-layer designed to simplify...".


Please remember to fill in all fields using lowercase letters.

components.label: Server-side JavaScript
HelpModal
components.content:
Import Documents

1. Import Documents

Upload your file by clicking on the New Document button to upload a document in PDF (up to 10MB and 200 pages) or in a TXT (up to 1MB) formats. Other formats like docx, xlsx, pptx will be convert to txt (With same 1MB Limit).

2. Training

After uploading a document, you have to make sure that they are now part of the knowledge base.
· You do that by using the training process. Click on the button "Training" on the top right corner.
· Press "Refresh" button until the message "Important! You have new trainable BOT" disappear.


Notes
Retrain your Knowledge AI content whenever you make changes to a document or FAQ.

The training process of a PDF may take a little longer than training TXT files. If you face any issues with specific files in cases of very large trainings (which may involve too many documents or PDFs close to the 200-page limit), wait a few moments and try training again.

**How to Fix and Reprocess a Document with Errors**

1. **Delete the Document**: Remove the faulty document from the system to avoid conflicts.
2. **Fix the Issue**: Open the document, resolve formatting, data, or encoding problems, and save the corrected file. Try changing the checks formats conditions of uploading page.
3. **Re-upload**: Upload the fixed document to the system.
4. **Start Processing**: Trigger the training or indexing process again.
5. **Repeat if Needed**: If errors persist, review system requirements and retry.

components.label: HTML
components.content:
Upload Document

Documents good practices


Longer paragraphs

Knowledge AI works better if you provide more context. Also, the longer the content, the better the inference. It you have two short paragraphs, it's better to combine them into a single, longer paragraph with four sentences.


Leted lists

Bullet lists are an example of the lack of context in short paragraphs. Try to convert those lists into full paragraphs.


Avoid tables and forms

Knowledge AI won't read well tables and forms. A more effective approach is to reformat the content into paragraphs for better comprehension.


Remove elements that aren't relevant

Headers, footers containing addresses or phone numbers, summaries, and similar elements may include unnecessary information, potentially hindering the delivery of a more precise answer.


Tips for FAQs (Frequently Asked Questions)

Before uploading a FAQ, make sure that you have removed the questions from the document. Upload the FAQ file with only the answers. Knowledge AI performs more effectively with FAQs when questions are not included.


Tips for Spreadsheets

When uploading an .xlsx file, it's a good practice to include the column names in the first row. Each subsequent row will be transcribed into paragraph format. Additionally, each sheet within the workbook will be saved as a separate .txt file, ensuring better comprehension and processing by the AI. This structure helps maintain clarity and organization in the content.


Tips for Powerpoints

When uploading a .pptx file, only the text from each slide will be extracted and saved as a plain text file. Currently, images will not be converted. This approach helps ensure that the textual content is properly captured and organized, allowing for better comprehension and processing by the AI.
Important! Currently, images will not be converted. If this process does not meet your needs, you can manually convert the .pptx to a PDF and upload it again. This alternative may help retain more of the original formatting and content.
